ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm used (e.g., LR, SVM, GNB) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's purpose or data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., classification, regression, clustering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset contents */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the dataset */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model on the dataset */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model on the dataset */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 Score of the model on the dataset */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Training time taken (in seconds) */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during training (in MB) */,
  "model_size" REAL /* Size of the model (in KB) */,
  "testing_time" REAL /* Testing time taken (in seconds) */,
  "evaluation_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the access event */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model related to the parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., learning rate) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance history entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being tracked */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Historical accuracy of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Historical recall of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Historical precision of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* Historical F1 Score of the model */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded metrics */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model involved in the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user running the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main model */,
  "dependent_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dependencies_dependent_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dependencies_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "notification_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
